workspace.title: Admin workspace
workspace.description: Manage users, templates, and system settings from this admin area.

settings.title: System settings
settings.description: Manage mail, operating configuration, and default SEO for the entire platform.

feedback.error: Settings could not be saved. Check the data and try again.

email.title: Email settings
email.description: Configure system email delivery, including SMTP host, port, username, and password.

system.title: System configuration
system.description: Set platform identity, language, timezone, and operating limits.

allowRegistration.label: Allow account registration
allowRegistration.description: New users can create their own portfolio accounts.

maintenanceMode.label: Enable maintenance mode
maintenanceMode.description: Temporarily lock public experiences while the system is updated.

seo.title: SEO settings
seo.description: Configure metadata, sharing image, and default indexing options for the site.

metaTitle.label: Default SEO title
metaTitle.placeholder: Enter the title shown in search results

metaDescription.label: Default SEO description
metaDescription.placeholder: Write a short description for the homepage and pages without custom metadata

indexing.label: Allow indexing
indexing.description: Allow search engines to crawl public pages.

openGraph.label: Enable Open Graph
openGraph.description: Generate sharing metadata for Facebook, LinkedIn, and compatible platforms.

twitterCard.label: Enable Twitter Card
twitterCard.description: Optimize previews when links are shared on X.

sitemap.label: Generate sitemap automatically
sitemap.description: Update the sitemap from portfolios and public pages.

jsonLd.label: Enable JSON-LD
jsonLd.description: Add structured data to support rich results.

notFound.title: Admin page not found
notFound.description: The admin route you opened does not exist or has not been enabled yet.
